content:
I need to analyze the code to identify which files belong to the `plugins` package and then count relations where both source and target are within that package.

Looking at the code provided, I can see files from various packages:
- `mermaid/` package (auto-repair, comment-generator, diagram-generator, generator, grouper, etc.)
- `parsers/` package (class-extractor, interface-extractor, enum-extractor, relation-extractor, typescript-parser, parallel-parser, etc.)

There is no `plugins` package represented in any of the source files above. None of the file paths, imports, or entity IDs reference a `plugins` package.

{"answer": 0}
